title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 650.270 - Operation without inspection certificate, penalty
text:
650.270.  Operation without inspection certificate, penalty. — It shall be unlawful for any person, firm, partnership or corporation to operate in this state a boiler or pressure vessel, except a pressure vessel covered by owner or user inspection service as provided for in section 650.265, without a valid inspection certificate.  The operation of a boiler or pressure vessel without an inspection certificate, or at a pressure exceeding that specified in the inspection certificate, is a class A misdemeanor.  Each day of unlawful operation is a separate offense.
(L. 1984 H.B. 1060 § 16)
